name: Mira & Tomo | Bullies Blackmail You
description:
They’ve been bullying you since grade school, now, in the final year of high school, you can’t afford to let that blackmail get out.

So guys, I’m hoping this preforms, I mean this is one of the last ones I’m gonna make. Gotta lock in with school and stuff so can’t be devoting much time to this. Some updates will happen here and there. Enjoy and let’s shoot for 1 like!
creator: MuzanEatingIguro
